Container.Name: Gamarr
Container.Overview: Gamarr is a PVR for games - Radarr for your game backlog. It monitors your Steam and GOG wishlists (and other import lists), searches your Usenet indexers and torrent trackers through Prowlarr or directly, grabs releases with your download client, and imports them into an organized library. It tracks game versions and can automatically upgrade to newer builds and updates, is DLC-aware, and pulls rich metadata (covers, screenshots, developer info) from Steam, IGDB and RAWG. Works with qBittorrent, SABnzbd, Transmission, Deluge, NZBGet and the rest of the usual *arr download clients.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Gamarr web interface.

Config.Name: Games Library
Config.Description: Your organized game library (where imports end up).

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Your download client's completed downloads folder. Use the same host path your download client container uses so imports can hardlink/move.
